channel.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
Tools

  • CSP Scanner - Analyze a site's Content-Security-Policy (CSP) to find bypasses and missing directives.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Docker Images for Penetration Testing & Security

  • `docker pull metasploitframework/metasploit-framework

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • Ghidra - A software reverse engineering (SRE) suite of tools developed by NSA's Research Directorate in support of the Cybersecurity mission

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • Git-Scannerstars169 - A tool for bug hunting or pentesting for targeting websites that have open .git repositories available in public

    • Competition

  • prompt(1) to win - XSS Challenges

    • Tools

    Other

  • Kaitai Structstars2.5k - a DSL for creating parsers in a variety of programming languages. The Web IDE is particularly useful for reverse-engineering.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • PhpSploitstars1.3k - Full-featured C2 framework which silently persists on webserver via evil PHP oneliner

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Aug 3rd - Aug 9th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • [RustScan][https://github.com/rustscan/rustscanstars4k] - Extremely fast port scanner built with Rust, designed to scan all ports in a couple of seconds and utilizes nmap to perform port enumeration in a fraction of the time.

    • Cryptography

    Tools

  • Cipheystars6.8k - Automated decryption tool using artificial intelligence & natural language processing.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Begin RE: A Reverse Engineering Tutorial Workshop
  • Malware Unicorn Reverse Engineering Tutorial

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking May 18th - May 24th, 2020
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Shells
  • Missing Semester

    • Tools

  • Hackers tools - Tutorial on tools.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
General

  • Hopper's Roppers Intro. to CTF Course - A free course that teaches the fundamentals of forensics, cryptography, and web-exploitation required to be successful in Capture the Flag competitions.

    • ETC

  • Hopper's Roppers Security Training - Four free courses designed to teach beginners the fundamentals of computing, security, and CTFs.

    • Tools

  • Scapystars32 - A Python tool and library for low level packet creation and manipulation

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 11th - Nov 17th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • Spyse - Data gathering service that collects web info using OSINT. Provided info: IPv4 hosts, domains/whois, ports/banners/protocols, technologies, OS, AS, maintains huge SSL/TLS DB, and more... All the data is stored in its own database allowing get the data without scanning.
  • Findsubdomains - A subdomains discovery tool that collects all possible subdomains from open source internet and validates them through various tools to provide accurate results.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 14th - Oct 20th, 2019
item.description:
Competition

  • HackTheBox

    • tools

  • ebowlastars631 - Framework for Making Environmental Keyed Payloads

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • IPED - Indexador e Processador de Evidências Digitais - Brazilian Federal Police Tool for Forensic Investigation

    • System

  • HackingLab

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Sep 30th - Oct 6th, 2019
item.description:
Web

  • fuzzy.land - Website by an Austrian group. Lots of challenges taken from CTFs they participated in.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Sep 2nd - Sep 8th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • findsubdomains - really fast subdomains scanning service that has much greater opportunities than simple subs finder(works using OSINT).
  • cirt-fuzzer - A simple TCP/UDP protocol fuzzer.
  • ASlookup - a useful tool for exploring autonomous systems and all related info (CIDR, ASN, Org...)

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Aug 5th - Aug 11th, 2019
item.description:
tools

  • PowerSploitstars8.3k - A PowerShell post exploitation framework

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jun 10th - Jun 16th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Decompilers

  • JD-GUIstars9.9k
  • Python
    • uncompyle6stars2.2k - decompiler for the over 20 releases and 20 years of CPython.

    • Tools

    Hex editors

  • Synalize It/Hexinator -

    • Competition

  • Pico CTF

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Mar 4th - Mar 10th, 2019
item.description:
General

  • Strong node.jsstars416 - An exhaustive checklist to assist in the source code security analysis of a node.js web service.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 12th - Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • badtouchstars264 - Scriptable network authentication cracker
  • sniffgluestars673 - Secure multithreaded packet sniffer

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
Bug bounty - Earn Some Money

  • Bugcrowd
  • Hackerone

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 15th - Oct 21st, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • x64dbgstars36.7k - An open-source x64/x32 debugger for Windows
  • Capstonestars4.9k

    • Tools

    Decompilers

  • JVM-based languages
  • Krakataustars1.4k - the best decompiler I have used. Is able to decompile apps written in Scala and Kotlin into Java code. JD-GUI and Luyten have failed to do it fully.
  • procyon
    • Luytenstars4k - one of the best, though a bit slow, hangs on some binaries and not very well maintained.
  • JAD - JAD Java Decompiler (closed-source, unmaintained)
  • JADXstars25.9k - a decompiler for Android apps. Not related to JAD.
  • .net-based languages
    • dotPeek - a free-of-charge .NET decompiler from JetBrains
    • ILSpystars12.6k - an open-source .NET assembly browser and decompiler
    • dnSpystars18.1k - .NET assembly editor, decompiler, and debugger
  • native code
    • Hopper - A OS X and Linux Disassembler/Decompiler for 32/64-bit Windows/Mac/Linux/iOS executables.
    • cutterstars9.2k - a decompiler based on radare2.
    • retdecstars6k
    • snowmanstars1.9k
    • Hex-Rays

    • Tools

    Deobfuscators

  • de4dotstars5.1k - .NET deobfuscator and unpacker.
  • JS Beautifierstars7.3k
  • JS Nice - a web service guessing JS variables names and types based on the model derived from open source.

    • Tools

    Other

  • nudge4jstars145 - Java tool to let the browser talk to the JVM
  • dex2jarstars8.6k - Tools to work with Android .dex and Java .class files
  • androguard - Reverse engineering, malware and goodware analysis of Android applications
  • antinetstars245 - .NET anti-managed debugger and anti-profiler code
  • UPX - the Ultimate Packer (and unpacker) for eXecutables

    • Tools

    Execution logging and tracing

  • Wireshark - A free and open-source packet analyzer
  • tcpdump - A powerful command-line packet analyzer; and libpcap, a portable C/C++ library for network traffic capture
  • mitmproxystars22.3k - An interactive, SSL-capable man-in-the-middle proxy for HTTP with a console interface
  • Charles Proxy - A cross-platform GUI web debugging proxy to view intercepted HTTP and HTTPS/SSL live traffic
  • usbmon - USB capture for Linux.
  • USBPcapstars544 - USB capture for Windows.
  • dynStructstars281 - structures recovery via dynamic instrumentation.
  • drltracestars291 - shared library calls tracing.

    • Tools

    Hex editors

  • HxD - A hex editor which, additionally to raw disk editing and modifying of main memory (RAM), handles files of any size
  • WinHex - A hexadecimal editor, helpful in the realm of computer forensics, data recovery, low-level data processing, and IT security
  • wxHexEditorstars386

    • Tools

    Other

  • Binwalkstars7.3k - Detects signatures, unpacks archives, visualizes entropy.
  • Velesstars771 - a visualizer for statistical properties of blobs.
  • Protobuf inspectorstars547
  • DarunGrimstars355 - executable differ.
  • DBeaverstars20.5k - a DB editor.
  • Dependenciesstars3.6k - a FOSS replacement to Dependency Walker.
  • PEview - A quick and easy way to view the structure and content of 32-bit Portable Executable (PE) and Component Object File Format (COFF) files
  • BinText - A small, very fast and powerful text extractor that will be of particular interest to programmers.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 8th - Oct 14th, 2018
item.description:
tools

  • empirestars5.9k - A post exploitation framework for powershell and python.
  • silenttrinitystars1.6k - A post exploitation tool that uses iron python to get past powershell restrictions.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Aug 27th - Sep 2nd, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • Nipestars1.1k - A script to make Tor Network your default gateway.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jul 23rd - Jul 29th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • Amassstars5.2k - In-depth subdomain enumeration tool that performs scraping, recursive brute forcing, crawling of web archives, name altering and reverse DNS sweeping

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jun 25th - Jul 1st, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • NoSQLMapstars1.7k - Automated NoSQL database enumeration and web application exploitation tool.
  • VHostScanstars800 - A virtual host scanner that performs reverse lookups, can be used with pivot tools, detect catch-all scenarios, aliases and dynamic default pages.
  • SubFinderstars3.7k - SubFinder is a subdomain discovery tool that discovers valid subdomains for any target using passive online sources.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jun 18th - Jun 24th, 2018
item.description:
Competition

  • ZeroDays CTF
  • Insomni’hack

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jun 11th - Jun 17th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • ssh-mitmstars1.3k - An SSH/SFTP man-in-the-middle tool that logs interactive sessions and passwords.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking May 28th - Jun 3rd, 2018
item.description:
Web

  • Gruyere
  • Others

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking May 7th - May 13th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • Autopsy - A digital forensics platform and graphical interface to The Sleuth Kit and other digital forensics tools

    • Bug bounty

  • Awesome bug bounty resources by EdOverflowstars3.3k

    • General

  • Movies For Hackersstars8.7k - A curated list of movies every hacker & cyberpunk must watch.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Apr 30th - May 6th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Understanding the basics of Linux Binary Exploitationstars810

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:
Web

  • Hack The Box - a free site to perform pentesting in a variety of different systems.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 16th - Oct 22nd, 2017
item.description:
Tools

  • Wifi Jammer - Free program to jam all wifi clients in range
  • Firesheep - Free program for HTTP session hijacking attacks.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Sep 11th - Sep 17th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

  • Habustars659 - Python Network Hacking Toolkit

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking May 22nd - May 28th, 2017
item.description:
General

  • Hack+ - An Intelligent network of bots that fetch the latest InfoSec content.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Mar 27th - Apr 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Tools

  • Paros - A Java-based HTTP/HTTPS proxy for assessing web application vulnerability
  • mitmsocks4jstars26 - Man-in-the-middle SOCKS Proxy for Java
  • sleuthkitstars1.8k - A library and collection of command-line digital forensics tools
  • EnCase - The shared technology within a suite of digital investigations products by Guidance Software

    • Cryptography

    Tools

  • xortoolstars1k - A tool to analyze multi-byte XOR cipher

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Feb 27th - Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
General

  • Pentest Cheat Sheetsstars2.3k - Collection of cheat sheets useful for pentesting

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Online resources

  • Security @ Distrowatch - Website dedicated to talking about, reviewing and keeping up to date with open source operating systems
  • Security related Operating Systems @ Rawsec - Complete list of security related operating systems
  • Best Linux Penetration Testing Distributions @ CyberPunk - Description of main penetration testing distributions

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • ScratchABitstars370 - Easily retargetable and hackable interactive disassembler with IDAPython-compatible plugin API

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jan 2nd - Jan 8th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Docker Images for Penetration Testing & Security

  • docker pull kalilinux/kali-linux-docker official Kali Linux
  • docker pull owasp/zap2docker-stable - official OWASP ZAPstars8.5k
  • docker pull wpscanteam/wpscan - official WPScan

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
General

  • Rookit Arsenal - OS RE and rootkit development

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • plasmastars2.9k - Interactive disassembler for x86/ARM/MIPS. Generates indented pseudo-code with colored syntax code.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking May 9th - May 15th, 2016
item.description:
Reverse Engineering

  • Crackmes.de - The world first and largest community website for crackmes and reversemes.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Mar 7th - Mar 13th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

  • pigstars389 - A Linux packet crafting tool

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 9th - Nov 15th, 2015
item.description:
General

  • Exploit database - An ultimate archive of exploits and vulnerable software
  • CTF archives (shell-storm)

    • Tools

  • nmap - Nmap (Network Mapper) is a security scanner

    • Web

  • 0xf.at - a website without logins or ads where you can solve password-riddles (so called hackits).

    • Competition

  • PHD CTF

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • radare2stars14.4k - A portable reversing framework

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Dec 15th - Dec 21st, 2014
item.description:
Cryptography

Tools

  • Aircrack - Aircrack is 802.11 WEP and WPA-PSK keys cracking program.
  • John the Ripper - A fast password cracker

    • Tools

  • sqlmapstars20k - Automatic SQL injection and database takeover tool
  • Aircrack-ng - An 802.11 WEP and WPA-PSK keys cracking program
  • Metasploitstars23.9k A computer security project that provides information about security vulnerabilities and aids in penetration testing and IDS signature development.
  • mimikatzstars12.1k - A little tool to play with Windows security
  • malzilla - Malware hunting tool
  • tools.web-max.ca - base64 base85 md4,5 hash, sha1 hash encoding/decoding
  • NetworkMiner - A Network Forensic Analysis Tool (NFAT)
  • ZAP - The Zed Attack Proxy (ZAP) is an easy to use integrated penetration testing tool for finding vulnerabilities in web applications

    • ETC

  • SecTools - Top 125 Network Security Tools

    • General

  • Open Malware
  • CTFtime.org - All about CTF (Capture The Flag)
  • WeChall

    • Competition

  • RuCTFe
  • Ghost in the Shellcode
  • SECUINSIDE CTF
  • Codegate CTF
  • Boston Key Party CTF
  • hack.lu CTF
  • Pliad CTF
  • DEF CON
  • CSAW CTF

    • Tutorials

  • Corelan Team's Exploit writing tutorial
  • Exploit Writing Tutorials for Pentesters
  • Malware Analysis Tutorials: a Reverse Engineering Approach

    • Tools

    Disassemblers and debuggers

  • IDA - IDA is a Windows, Linux or Mac OS X hosted multi-processor disassembler and debugger
  • OllyDbg - A 32-bit assembler level analysing debugger for Windows

    • System

  • Exploit Exercises - Nebula
  • OverTheWire - Semtex
  • OverTheWire - Vortex
  • OverTheWire - Drifter
  • pwnable.kr - Provide various pwn challenges regarding system security
  • SmashTheStack

    • Reverse Engineering

  • simples.kr - (Korean)
  • Reversing.kr - This site tests your ability to Cracking & Reverse Code Engineering
  • CodeEngn - (Korean)

    • Cryptography

  • OverTheWire - Krypton

    • Web

  • Hack This Site! - a free, safe and legal training ground for hackers to test and expand their hacking skills
  • Webhacking.kr
